channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial Proceeds with Key Testimonies and Legal Arguments
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte entered its second day with the Senate impeachment court focusing on allegations under Article IV, which accuses her of orchestrating a grave threa...

item.title: Jalang’o and Shornarwa Address Allegations of Inappropriate Behavior
item.description: Lang’ata MP Jalang’o and influencer Shornarwa have publicly addressed online rumors about their interaction at a recent event. Fans speculated that Shornarwa was being too forward with Jalang’o, citin...

item.title: Argentina vs Egypt: Clash of titans in FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16
item.description: Defending champions Argentina face a tough test against Egypt in the FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16. The match, set for Tuesday, highlights the clash between Argentina's quest for historical immortal...

item.title: George Massey Tunnel Replacement Project Budget Surpasses $8.5 Billion
item.description: The budget for replacing the George Massey Tunnel has increased to $8.5 billion, more than doubling the original estimate of $4.15 billion. The completion date has been delayed from December 2030 to S...

item.title: Royal guest barred from staying at Buckingham Palace over delayed acceptance
item.description: The article discusses a royal guest who was reportedly denied the opportunity to remain at Buckingham Palace due to delays in accepting an invitation. While the specific individual or context is not d...

item.title: Ali Modu Sheriff Praises Tinubu’s Policies for Nigeria’s Progress
item.description: Former Borno State Governor, Ali Modu Sheriff, has defended President Bola Tinubu’s leadership, urging Nigerians to acknowledge his efforts in advancing the country. During an interview on Channels Te...

item.title: Provincial government launches operation to eliminate suspected terrorists in Hanna Urak after clashes
item.description: A violent clash between locals and armed men in Hanna Urak on the outskirts of Quetta resulted in the death of three people and injuries to at least nine others. The provincial government launched an ...

item.title: Nintendo to Discontinue Original Switch Sales in Europe by 2027
item.description: Nintendo has announced that it will cease selling the original Switch console to European retailers by mid-February 2027. This decision follows new regulatory requirements in the European Union mandat...

item.title: Constitutional Court's NHI Ruling and Its Impact on Healthcare Policy
item.description: The article explores the role of South Africa's Constitutional Court in evaluating the legislative process for the National Health Insurance (NHI) Act. It highlights how judicial review ensures adhere...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Injured After Falling from Sixth Floor During Domestic Dispute
item.description: A 25-year-old woman from Nairobi's Thome Estate fell from the sixth floor of an apartment building, sustaining severe injuries and fighting for her life in Kenyatta National Hospital. Her sister, Anne...

item.title: AI-created actor Tilly Norwood to lead controversial comedy film Misaligned amid Hollywood backlash
item.description: A controversial new comedy film, Misaligned, is set to star Tilly Norwood, an AI-generated 'actor' created by Particle6 Productions. The film, described as a hybrid of traditional filmmaking and AI te...

item.title: NATO Allies Boost Defense Spending to Address Trump's Concerns Over Security Commitments
item.description: NATO allies are gathering in Ankara for a critical summit aimed at addressing U.S. President Donald Trump's demands for increased defense spending and greater European responsibility in security matte...

item.title: OAGF and Presidency Give Conflicting Accounts Over Alleged PFIPC CBN Account as Investigation Deepens

item.title: Belgium Defeats USA in World Cup Round of 16, Faces Spain in Quarterfinals
item.description: Belgium delivered a stunning 4-1 victory over the United States in their FIFA World Cup Round of 16 clash, eliminating the co-hosts from contention and setting up a quarter-final showdown against Spai...

item.title: MPs Condemn Misleading Comparisons of Student Loans to Phone Contracts
item.description: A report by the Treasury Committee has criticized the government's practice of comparing student loan repayments to phone contracts or cinema tickets as 'mis-selling', arguing that such comparisons we...

item.title: Netflix's Binge Model Faces Challenges from Short-Form Content
item.description: The article discusses how Netflix's original binge-watching model, which revolutionized streaming by releasing entire seasons at once, may now be outdated due to changing viewer habits and competition...

item.title: Indian Embassy in Washington renews $1.8 million lobbying contract with SHW Partners for outreach to the Trump administration
item.description: India's Embassy in Washington has renewed a 12-month lobbying agreement worth $1.8 million with SHW Partners LLC, a firm founded by Jason Miller, who previously served as US President Donald Trump's c...

item.title: Colonial wildlife laws in Africa fail to balance conservation and community needs
item.description: The article discusses how Africa's wildlife laws, rooted in colonial-era systems, continue to separate communities from nature and restrict their access to land and resources. These laws, based on the...

item.title: Kenyan Prince Sparks Speculation After Being Spotted With Mystery Woman At Summer Tides
item.description: Kenyan Prince, a self-declared forex trader, has sparked fresh rumors after being captured on video spending time with an unidentified woman at the Summer Tides event in Malindi. The incident comes am...
